final:
module top_module(
    input D,
    input CLK,
    input SET_B,
    input RESET_B,
    output reg Q,  // Change Q to output reg type
    output Q_N
);assign Q_N = ~Q;

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge CLK or negedge SET_B or negedge RESET_B or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (!SET_B) begin
            Q <= 1'b1;
        end else if (!RESET_B) begin
            Q <= 1'b0;
        end else begin
            Q <= D;
        end
    end

endmodule
